competitors.name: Cursor
competitors.raw_snapshot: Cursor 3.0 (April 2, 2026): run many agents in parallel across repos and environments—locally, in worktrees, in the cloud, and on remote SSH. Cursor 3.2 (April 24): /multitask runs async subagents to parallelize requests; a single agent session can now target a reusable workspace made of multiple folders, allowing cross-repo changes spanning frontend, backend, and shared libraries. Cursor 3.3 (May 7): Build in Parallel subagents, pinned-skill pills, Composer 2.5 with multi-file refactor at file-tree scale, native Jira integration. Cursor 3.5 (May 20): Cloud Agents—agents that run in isolated cloud VMs with full terminal, browser, and desktop access, work across multiple repos in parallel, report results back to your IDE asynchronously. Enterprise (June 2026): manage multiple Cursor teams from one place with different security, governance, budget, and feature controls; new Premium seat for heavy agent users, split usage pools, real-time spend visibility. Source: WebSearch/releasebot.io/cursor.com/codersera.com (来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文)
competitors.content_hash: Cursor 3.0 (April 2, 2026): run many agents in parallel across repos and environments—locally, in worktrees, in the cloud, and on remote SSH. Cursor 3.2 (April 24): /m

changes.description: Cloud Agents (3.5)：隔离云 VM 中运行 agent，全 terminal/browser/desktop 权限，跨 repo 并行，异步汇报
changes.evidence: 「Cloud Agents: isolated cloud VMs, report results back to IDE asynchronously」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：AI 快 session 在云端独立执行、异步汇报，人+AI 并行协作协议雏形在 Cursor 内落地

changes.description: /multitask (3.2)：单个 agent session 可指向多文件夹 workspace，async 子 agent fleet 跨 repo 工作
changes.evidence: 「a single agent session can target a reusable workspace of multiple folders」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：agent session 跨 repo/跨工具 context 拉取，抽象层与 meee2 F9 pull 高度重叠

changes.description: Cursor 自我重定位为「agent execution runtime」，编辑器只是附属
changes.evidence: 「an agent execution runtime that happens to have an editor attached」

changes.description: 企业多团队统一治理：安全/预算/功能控制独立，新增 Premium seat
changes.evidence: 「manage multiple Cursor teams from one place, with different security, governance, budget, and feature controls for each」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：企业级 agent session 治理层，向人+AI 同协议的制度化方向发展

key_findings: Cursor 3.5 Cloud Agents：云 VM 中异步运行 agent，多 repo 并行，完全脱离本地 IDE 执行——「快 session」概念已在 Cursor 落地
/multitask 让单个 agent session 管辖多文件夹 workspace，首次出现跨 repo 统一 session 抽象

competitors.name: OpenAI / ChatGPT
competitors.raw_snapshot: ChatGPT Agent (evolution of Operator): combines browsing, code execution, deep analysis—can navigate websites, run code, conduct analysis, deliver editable slideshows and spreadsheets. Example: 'analyze three competitors and create a slide deck.' Enterprise Workspace Agents: own entire workflows, follow team processes, be shared across your team so people can build once and use together. Projects+Memory system with 'dreaming': memory auto-updates as time passes. Canvas downgraded: writing and coding now via writing blocks and code blocks directly in chat. Agent Builder: visual drag-and-drop tool launched 2026. Source: WebSearch/openai.com/help.openai.com (来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文)
competitors.content_hash: ChatGPT Agent (evolution of Operator): combines browsing, code execution, deep analysis—can navigate websites, run code, conduct analysis, deliver editable slideshows an

changes.description: Enterprise Workspace Agents：团队共享 agent，拥有完整 workflow，一次构建全员使用
changes.evidence: 「shared across your team so people can build once and use together」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：「build once and use together」的共享 agent workflow 是 session 同构协议的 Enterprise 实现

changes.description: ChatGPT Agent：整合 Operator+深度研究，浏览网页+执行代码+输出可编辑 artifact（slides/spreadsheets）
changes.evidence: 「navigate websites, run code, conduct analysis, deliver editable spreadsheets」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #2：agent 直接输出可编辑 artifact，但暂未见跨工具 live link 机制

changes.description: Memory「dreaming」：记忆随时间自动更新，跨 session 持久化用户状态
changes.evidence: 「memories are automatically updated as time passes」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：跨 session 状态同步，但属于用户状态而非 artifact live link

key_findings: Enterprise Workspace Agents 上线：可拥有整条 workflow、遵循团队流程、跨成员共享——首次出现 ChatGPT 级别的 session 协议雏形
ChatGPT Agent 整合 Operator 能力：全栈执行（浏览+代码+分析）+ 可编辑 artifact 输出，Canvas 降级为 chat blocks

competitors.name: Windsurf (Codeium)
competitors.raw_snapshot: Windsurf is now rebranded as Devin Desktop, with the IDE foundation being built on to introduce an Agent Command Center for managing all agents in one place, including Spaces, Kanban view, and multi-agent management. Devin Cloud Agent: 'our autonomous cloud agent built directly into Windsurf' that spins up its own machine in the cloud and works autonomously on complex tasks while developers continue coding locally. Cascade Memory System improvements—remembers codebase structure and preferences across conversations. Enhanced Multi-Model Routing automatically selects best model for task type. MCP Tool Support for Supabase, Notion, GitHub. Gemini 3 Pro preview for paid subscribers. Source: WebSearch/windsurf.com/weavai.app/fundesk.io (来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文)
competitors.content_hash: Windsurf is now rebranded as Devin Desktop, with the IDE foundation being built on to introduce an Agent Command Center for managing all agents in one place, including S

changes.description: Windsurf 全面更名为 Devin Desktop，从 IDE 转型为 agent 管理中心
changes.evidence: 「rebranded as Devin Desktop to introduce an Agent Command Center for all agents」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：从编辑器重新定位为「管理所有 agent 的中心」，向 meee2 的 session 协调层直接竞争

changes.description: Agent Command Center：Spaces + Kanban 视图统一管理所有 agent，首个以 agent 调度为核心 UI 的 IDE 产品
changes.evidence: 「Agent Command Center: Spaces, Kanban view, multi-agent management in one place」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：Kanban of agents = 人+AI session 同协议的可视化管理界面

changes.description: Devin Cloud Agent 内置：云端自主运行，本地继续编码，异步汇报
changes.evidence: 「spins up a cloud machine, works autonomously while developers continue coding」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：AI 快 session 云端执行，人慢 session 本地工作，开始出现人+AI 并行协议

key_findings: Windsurf → Devin Desktop：完整品牌重塑，IDE 功能变成 agent 管理中心（Agent Command Center + Spaces + Kanban）的底层
Devin Cloud Agent 内置：云端自主 agent 本地报告，首次出现「本地人工作 + 云端 AI 工作」并行模式

competitors.name: Claude.ai / Anthropic
competitors.raw_snapshot: Claude Cowork (shipped Jan 2026 research preview, GA Feb 2026): Anthropic's agentic AI for knowledge work, runs on desktop, connects to local files and applications, completes multi-step tasks from start to finish. Enterprise connectors + private plugin marketplace (Feb 2026). Dispatch + Computer Use (March 2026): dispatch tasks from your phone, desktop agent picks them up and executes. 'When you assign a task, Claude figures out what kind of work is needed and spins up the right session. Development tasks run in Claude Code; knowledge work runs in Cowork.' Claude 4 (Opus 4, Sonnet 4). Claude Code Routines (April 2026): scheduled/triggered autonomous execution in Claude Code. Triggered $285B SaaS selloff per CNBC. Source: WebSearch/anthropic.com/support.claude.com/fortune.com (来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文)
competitors.content_hash: Claude Cowork (shipped Jan 2026 research preview, GA Feb 2026): Anthropic's agentic AI for knowledge work, runs on desktop, connects to local files and applications, co

changes.description: Claude Cowork Dispatch：手机端发出任务 → 桌面端自动路由到正确 session（Claude Code 或 Cowork）执行
changes.evidence: 「figures out what kind of work is needed and spins up the right session」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1+#5：手机 5 字指令触发桌面 session routing，人=慢 session/AI=快 session/同一协议的完整实现

changes.description: Claude Cowork 桌面端 Computer Use：直接操控本地文件/应用，完成 multi-step 知识工作任务
changes.evidence: 「permission to read, edit, and create files to actually complete tasks」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：AI session 获得本地操作权限，从「建议」升级为「执行」

changes.description: Claude Code Routines（April 2026）：定时/触发式自动执行框架
changes.evidence: 「Claude Code now includes routines, which was introduced in April 2026」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：AI session 获得自主调度能力，向持久化 agent 演化

key_findings: Claude Cowork Dispatch 是迄今最接近 meee2 核心设计的竞品特性：手机→桌面 session routing，自动区分开发任务（Claude Code）vs 知识工作（Cowork）
Claude Cowork 已形成「手机发指令→桌面 agent 执行→local files 交付」的完整闭环，对 meee2 peripheral 层（锚点 #5）构成直接威胁

competitors.name: GitHub Copilot
competitors.raw_snapshot: GitHub Copilot standalone desktop app announced at Microsoft Build 2026 (June 2). 'My Work' view consolidates active agent sessions, issues, pull requests, and background automations into a single dashboard. Every parallel agent session runs in its own isolated git worktree—up to ten agents against the same repository simultaneously. Three session modes: Interactive (collaborate step by step), Plan (agent proposes, you approve), Autopilot (fully autonomous). /every schedules recurring prompts and background tasks. Cloud automations: agents run on schedule, respond to GitHub events. Autonomous Agent Mode (July 2026 Enterprise): write, test, commit entire feature branches. Agent Sandbox: ephemeral Linux container per task. Shared Canvases feature. Project Polaris replaces GPT-4. Source: WebSearch/github.blog/devops.com/digitalapplied.com (来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文)
competitors.content_hash: GitHub Copilot standalone desktop app announced at Microsoft Build 2026 (June 2). 'My Work' view consolidates active agent sessions, issues, pull requests, and backgrou

changes.description: 独立桌面 App + 「My Work」session 仪表板：统一展示 active sessions、issues、PRs、background automations
changes.evidence: 「My Work view consolidates active agent sessions, PRs, background automations」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：「active agent sessions」在统一仪表板可见，sessions 首次成为 Copilot 的一等公民数据结构

changes.description: 并行最多 10 个 agent sessions，各自独立 git worktree，三种模式（Interactive/Plan/Autopilot）
changes.evidence: 「parallel agent sessions each in their own worktree, up to ten simultaneously」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：多并行 agent session + worktree 隔离 = AI 快 session 的制度化，向 session 同构演化

changes.description: /every 定期 prompts + Cloud Automations：agent 按调度运行，响应 GitHub 事件
changes.evidence: 「/every schedules recurring prompts and background tasks」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #5：定时触发 agent session 的 peripheral 调度层

changes.description: Shared Canvases：多用户/agent 共享画布协作
changes.evidence: 「GitHub Copilot App Debuts With Parallel AI Agents, Shared Canvases」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #2：Shared Canvas 如实时同步则触碰 live link 概念

key_findings: 【威胁升级信号 threat_changed=true】GitHub Copilot 推出独立桌面 App，「My Work」视图首次将 agent sessions 作为一等数据展示，从编辑器插件跃升为 agent 调度中心
并行 10 个 sessions + Interactive/Plan/Autopilot 三模式，使 Copilot 具备 meee2 式人机协作协议雏形
推断：threat 等级建议审查是否从 hi 升至 crit（已触碰 session 一等公民、My Work 仪表板、Shared Canvas 三个锚点）

competitors.name: Google Gemini / AI Studio
competitors.raw_snapshot: Google Workspace Studio (Google Cloud Next 2026): no-code AI agent builder powered by Gemini 3 using plain English. Skills created in Workspace Studio invokable anywhere Gemini is used in Workspace. Gemini Canvas (private preview): teams can co-create and edit in Google Docs and Slides via interactive editor; schedule Calendar meetings from canvas mode; Microsoft 365 interoperability. Agent Studio: dual-pane interactive canvas view for preview/edit code for artifacts. Agent Designer: visual flow canvas for building agent workflows (preview). Agent Garden: prebuilt agent solutions. A2A protocol (agent-to-agent). Source: WebSearch/workspace.google.com/gemini.google (来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文)
competitors.content_hash: Google Workspace Studio (Google Cloud Next 2026): no-code AI agent builder powered by Gemini 3 using plain English. Skills created in Workspace Studio invokable anywher

changes.description: Gemini Canvas（私有预览）：交互式编辑器，团队在 Docs/Slides 中实时协作创作
changes.evidence: 「interactive editor to co-create and edit in Docs and Slides」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #2：Canvas 内的共同实时编辑接近 live link artifact 概念，但限于 Google Workspace 生态内

changes.description: Workspace Studio：自然语言构建 agent workflow，Skill 可跨 Gemini 任意入口调用
changes.evidence: 「describe in plain language, Gemini 3 creates a flow for it」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #3：自然语言描述 → flow emerge，与 meee2 descriptive-first 范式重叠

key_findings: Gemini Canvas 进入私有预览：交互式实时协作编辑 Docs/Slides，是 Google 最接近 live link artifact 概念的功能
Workspace Studio 的 Skill 调用机制：一次创建，在任何 Gemini 入口可用——接近 meee2 的跨工具 artifact 访问模式

competitors.name: Linear
competitors.raw_snapshot: Linear Agent (March 24, 2026, public beta): understands roadmap, issues, and code. Accessible from desktop, mobile, Slack, Microsoft Teams, @Linear in comments. Save conversations as reusable skills—useful for recurring workflows like status catchup or drafting issues from meeting notes. Code Intelligence (May 14, 2026): gives Linear Agent controlled access to codebase, turns repositories into shared product context your whole team can use. Ask how a feature is implemented, what a change might affect, which constraints shape a plan. Deep-link to coding tools from issue with pre-filled prompt (issue ID + all context). Linear Releases: CI/CD integration, auto-updating issue statuses when code lands in production, generate release notes with Linear Agent. Source: WebSearch/linear.app/changelog (来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文)
competitors.content_hash: Linear Agent (March 24, 2026, public beta): understands roadmap, issues, and code. Accessible from desktop, mobile, Slack, Microsoft Teams, @Linear in comments. Save c

changes.description: Linear Agent + Code Intelligence：项目 context 与 codebase 打通，跨工具回答实现细节
changes.evidence: 「turns repositories into shared product context your whole team can use」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：Linear issue ↔ codebase 跨工具 context pull，与 meee2 F9 pull 场景部分重叠

changes.description: 可复用 skill + 全平台访问（Slack/Teams/desktop/mobile）
changes.evidence: 「When conversations produce good results, you can save them as reusable skills」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：可复用 skill = artifact 级别的跨工具 pull 雏形

key_findings: Linear Agent 公测上线，Code Intelligence 打通 codebase，Linear 从项目管理工具向跨工具 context 中枢演化
Deep-link + pre-filled prompt 机制：从 issue 一键跳转 coding agent 并带入 context——但这是单向跳转，非 live link

competitors.name: Notion AI
competitors.raw_snapshot: Notion Custom Agents (Feb 24, 2026): AI teammates that handle repetitive tasks autonomously 24/7 based on triggers or schedules; 1M+ Custom Agents created. Developer Platform (May 13, 2026): Notion Workers (hosted code execution runtime), External Agents API (partners: Claude, Codex, Decagon), Database sync powered by Workers. 50-page context window (up from 20), cross-page AI blocks, sub-3-second autofill, workspace-level prompt templates. TechCrunch: 'Notion just turned its workspace into a hub for AI agents.' Source: WebSearch/notion.com/techcrunch.com (来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文)
competitors.content_hash: Notion Custom Agents (Feb 24, 2026): AI teammates that handle repetitive tasks autonomously 24/7 based on triggers or schedules; 1M+ Custom Agents created. Developer Pl

changes.description: Developer Platform：Notion Workers（代码执行）+ External Agents API（接入 Claude/Codex），Notion 转型为 agent hub
changes.evidence: 「Notion just turned its workspace into a hub for AI agents」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：Notion 作为外部 agent 接入点，开始有 artifact 跨工具 pull 的平台意图

changes.description: Custom Agents：24/7 后台自主运行，基于触发器/调度，已有 100 万+ 创建
changes.evidence: 「Custom Agents run autonomously 24/7 based on triggers or schedules」

key_findings: Notion Developer Platform 上线：Workers + External Agents API 让 Notion 从笔记工具转型为 agent 编排平台
100 万+ Custom Agents 被创建，说明 24/7 后台 agent 在企业用户中快速普及

competitors.name: Slack
competitors.raw_snapshot: Slack AI agent creation platform: single 'slack create agent' command, Bolt framework, bring-your-own-LLM; sample apps for Claude SDK, OpenAI SDK, Pydantic AI. AI Generate step in Workflow Builder: select knowledge sources (channels, canvases, lists), LLM generates a response. Canvas AI: create/edit canvas via Slackbot, turn conversations into structured shareable content. Slackbot recurring tasks ('creating a meeting agenda canvas on a recurring basis'). Salesforce Data Fields bi-directionally synced in canvases. AI usage analytics for canvases. Source: WebSearch/slack.com/docs.slack.dev (来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文)
competitors.content_hash: Slack AI agent creation platform: single 'slack create agent' command, Bolt framework, bring-your-own-LLM; sample apps for Claude SDK, OpenAI SDK, Pydantic AI. AI Gene

changes.description: AI Generate workflow step + Canvas AI（对话转结构化内容）+ Slackbot 定期任务
changes.evidence: 「write a prompt, select knowledge sources, have an LLM generate a response」

key_findings: Slack 开放 agent 构建平台（BYOL + Bolt），Canvas 增加 Salesforce 双向数据同步——产品边界在扩展，核心仍是通讯工具

competitors.name: Reflect
competitors.raw_snapshot: Reflect AI features: GPT-4o and Claude 3.5 Sonnet model options. Semantic search. Whisper integration for meeting dictation (summary, action items auto-inserted). AI summaries for saved links (new 2026). End-to-end encryption for assets (new 2026). No major new features or structural changes detected. Source: WebSearch/reflect.app (来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文)
competitors.content_hash: Reflect AI features: GPT-4o and Claude 3.5 Sonnet model options. Semantic search. Whisper integration for meeting dictation. AI summaries for saved links (new 2026). E

changes.description: 已保存链接 AI 摘要 + 资产端到端加密（2026 新增）
changes.evidence: 「shipped AI summaries for saved links; assets are now end-to-end encrypted」

key_findings: Reflect 无重大结构性更新，以 AI 摘要和加密为主，产品形态稳定

competitors.name: Raycast
competitors.raw_snapshot: Raycast v2 public beta (May 2026): new UI, files & folders on root search, AI dictation. Presets renamed to Agents—reused across chats, update once and change applies everywhere. Team sharing for AI Agents, AI Commands, Dictation Styles (June 4, 2026). Skills: custom instructions loaded automatically when relevant to request. Memory: automatic summary Raycast AI builds from conversations over time, picking up on projects, preferences, goals. Profile: persistent context (role, preferred tools, communication style). MCP server support in Quick AI and AI Chat. Source: WebSearch/raycast.com/manual.raycast.com (来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文)
competitors.content_hash: Raycast v2 public beta (May 2026): new UI, files & folders on root search, AI dictation. Presets renamed to Agents—reused across chats, update once and change applies

changes.description: v2 重大发布：Presets 改名 Agents，跨对话复用；Memory + Profile 实现跨 session 持久化；团队共享 Agents
changes.evidence: 「Presets are now called Agents, reused across chats」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：Memory + Profile = 跨 session 持久化 context，向 meee2 跨 session artifact pull 方向延伸

changes.description: MCP 支持 + AI Dictation：语音输入 + 第三方工具 context 接入 Raycast AI
changes.evidence: 「You can now install MCP servers and use them in Quick AI and AI Chat」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #5：作为 macOS peripheral 工具扩展 MCP，接近 meee2 菜单栏触达任意 session 能力

key_findings: Raycast v2：Agents 概念（原 Presets）+ Memory + Profile + MCP，peripheral 工具向持久化 AI 伴随层演化
团队共享 Agents（June 4）：将 peripheral AI 配置提升为团队级资产

competitors.name: Replit
competitors.raw_snapshot: Replit Agent 4: multi-agent parallel tasks—agents run independent tasks simultaneously, progress always visible. Design Canvas replaces Design Mode—infinite board supporting all artifact types, live previews, direct manipulation tools. plan-while-building workflow (no wait between stages). Collaboration: shared project with agent-assisted merging, not fork-and-merge. Multiple outputs in one project: web apps, mobile apps, slides, videos sharing same backend. Replit pivoting to 'fully integrated productivity suite: canvas, apps, sites, slides, videos.' Source: WebSearch/replit.com/latent.space (来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文)
competitors.content_hash: Replit Agent 4: multi-agent parallel tasks—agents run independent tasks simultaneously, progress always visible. Design Canvas replaces Design Mode—infinite board suppor

changes.description: Design Canvas：取代 Design Mode，支持所有 artifact 类型的无限画布 + live previews
changes.evidence: 「Design Canvas: all artifact types, live previews, direct manipulation tools」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #2+#3：无限画布 + live preview 接近 live link artifact + descriptive canvas，但限于 Replit 生态内

changes.description: Replit 重定位为「全面集成生产力套件」：canvas + apps + sites + slides + videos
changes.evidence: 「fully integrated productivity suite: canvas, apps, sites, slides, videos」

key_findings: Design Canvas 是 Replit 迄今最接近 meee2 descriptive canvas 的功能：infinite board + live previews + all artifact types
Replit 向「生产力套件」转型，用户群体与 meee2 有一定重叠但产品范式不同

competitors.name: Superwhisper
competitors.raw_snapshot: Superwhisper v2.13.0 (April 2026, macOS): Claude Code and Open Code agent integration, piping transcripts into terminal agent. Integrates with Cursor, Claude Code, Open Code, Amp, Codex—'drive an entire fleet of agents faster than they can type.' v2.12.0 (April 2026): per-mode keyboard shortcuts. Gemini and Grok remote cloud AI support added. Redesigned UI with history, full text search, segmented playback. Realtime streaming UI with live transcription, anti-hallucination params. Bulk vocabulary CSV import (May 2026). Source: WebSearch/superwhisper.com/releasebot.io (来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文)
competitors.content_hash: Superwhisper v2.13.0 (April 2026, macOS): Claude Code and Open Code agent integration, piping transcripts into terminal agent. Integrates with Cursor, Claude Code, Open

changes.evidence: 「drive an entire fleet of agents faster than they can type」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #5：语音作为 peripheral 触发层驱动 agent session，与 meee2「5字戳任何 session」有功能相似性

key_findings: Superwhisper 正在成为 agent fleet 的语音 peripheral 入口，lo 威胁级别暂不变，但需关注是否出现 session 管理概念

competitors.name: Product Hunt AI 新品雷达
competitors.raw_snapshot: PH AI 近期上新（WebSearch 结果）：Yansu（学习用户工作模式，跨 files/messages/workflows 识别重复任务，转化为 apps/automations）、Mode AI（连接 Gmail/Docs/Outlook/Teams 的单一 voice/chat 界面助手）、Coworker AI（context-aware 模型路由，控制企业 token 成本）、Espa（AI 执行助理，处理待办/日程/邮件）。Source: WebSearch/producthunt.com (来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文)
competitors.content_hash: PH AI 近期上新：Yansu（学习用户工作模式，跨 files/messages/workflows 识别重复任务，转化为 apps/automations）、Mode AI（连接 Gmail/Docs/Outlook/Teams 的单一 voice/chat 界面助手）
competitors.no_change_reason: 今日 PH AI 上新约 4 款可识别产品（Yansu、Mode AI、Coworker AI、Espa），无与 meee2 核心抽象（session 同构、live link、descriptive canvas）高度重叠者。Yansu 命中 workspace+agent 2 个关键词，但属于 workflow automation 工具而非 session 管理平台，建议下次继续观察。

alerts.headline: Claude Cowork Dispatch：手机发令→桌面自动路由 session，首个「外部版 meee2」落地
alerts.evidence: 「figures out what kind of work is needed and spins up the right session」
alerts.action_suggestion: Dispatch 是迄今最接近 meee2 核心设计的竞品特性。建议立即分析 Dispatch 的 session routing 粒度（是否支持自定义 session 类型？），评估 meee2 的差异化空间是否仍在「人作为 session 参与者」而非「任务分配者」这条线上

alerts.headline: Cursor 3.5 Cloud Agents + 多文件夹 session workspace：IDE 转型为 agent execution runtime
alerts.evidence: 「agent session targets workspace of multiple folders; Cloud Agents report async」
alerts.action_suggestion: Cursor 已实现「AI 快 session 云端执行 + 异步汇报」的技术闭环。meee2 需要明确：人在 agent 图内的协作协议（锚点 #1）比 Cursor 的「人在 IDE 外等结果」模型有何本质区别，并在产品中体现这一差异

alerts.headline: Windsurf 全面更名 Devin Desktop，推出 Agent Command Center（Spaces + Kanban）
alerts.evidence: 「Agent Command Center: Spaces, Kanban view, multi-agent management in one place」
alerts.action_suggestion: Windsurf/Devin 的 Agent Command Center 是首个以 Kanban of agents 为核心 UI 的 IDE 级产品。建议关注其 Spaces 是否引入 session 持久化和人机协同概念；若是，威胁等级需上调至 crit

alerts.headline: Copilot 独立桌面 App 上线，「My Work」仪表板将 agent sessions 作为一等数据结构
alerts.evidence: 「My Work view consolidates active agent sessions, PRs, background automations」
alerts.action_suggestion: GitHub Copilot App 的「My Work」视图是首个将 session 作为一等公民的主流产品界面，threat_changed 已标记为 true。meee2 需要凸显：Copilot sessions 是纯编码任务单元，meee2 sessions 是人+AI 同构的工作单位，这一哲学差异是核心护城河

alerts.headline: ChatGPT Enterprise Workspace Agents：团队共享 agent workflow，build-once-use-together
alerts.evidence: 「shared across your team so people can build once and use together」
alerts.action_suggestion: Workspace Agents 的「团队共享 + 拥有完整 workflow」与 meee2 锚点 #1（session 同构协议）形成竞争。建议跟踪 Workspace Agents 是否引入「人参与 workflow 的 session 节点」，如果是，则与 meee2 的差异化将依赖锚点 #3（descriptive-first）和锚点 #2（live link）
